reasoning: Taylor Swift and The Weeknd are formidable competitors who surpass Bad Bunny in recent streaming metrics and market expectations. Swift generated over 26 billion streams in both 2023 and 2024—far exceeding Bad Bunny's 2022 peak of 18.5 billion—and she is releasing a new album in October 2025. Betting markets in late 2025 view Swift as the 'clear favourite.' Although Bad Bunny released a 17-track album in January 2025, The Weeknd also released an album in January and maintains higher monthly listeners. Given Bad Bunny's #3 finish in 2024 and Swift's unyielding momentum, it is highly unlikely he will reclaim the No. 1 spot in 2025.
